sources.name: 全国地方公共団体コード
sources.publisher: 総務省 (Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications)

sources.name: Municipal tourism pages
sources.note: robots.txt is read on every domain. See DATA_POLICY.md.

coverage.note: All 1,938 entities are treated in parallel. The 1,741 figure is the conventional 'municipality' count (市町村 + 特別区); the 197 are 政令指定都市の行政区 which carry their own JIS codes.

schedule.freshness_target_note: We aim to refresh every record within 30 days. This is the freshness target, not a load mitigation.

rate_limit.steady_state: 5 seconds minimum between requests to the same domain
rate_limit.initial_bootstrap: 2 seconds minimum, used only for the first build to complete in hours

data_freshness_promise: No record left stale beyond 30 days under steady-state operation.
